items.summary: In `frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx`, completely remove all authentication checks, login gates, and any conditional rendering that blocks or restricts access to the /admin route. The page must render immediately on load without requiring Internet Identity login or any identity verification. Remove all references to `useInternetIdentity`, `isAuthenticated`, or any auth state that gates the display of content. Ensure `useGetAllSubmissions` is called unconditionally on mount and submissions are displayed as soon as the query resolves.

In `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts`, ensure the `useGetAllSubmissions` hook creates and uses a fully anonymous actor (no Internet Identity dependency) to call the `getAllSubmissions` backend query. The hook must not reference or depend on any auth state, must not wait for a logged-in identity, and must run the query automatically on mount. Correctly unpack the returned array of submission records.
